name: How exactly does a law firm optimize for AI search step by step?
description: Schema > content clusters > track AI citations.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: How exactly does a law firm optimize for AI search step by step?

acceptedAnswer.text: Schema > content clusters > track AI citations.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Start with schema markup, then build AI-friendly content clusters.** Step 1: Add LegalService/FAQ schema; Step 2: Write scannable Q&A with gov citations; Step 3: Localize and update yearly.[1][2]

Process mirrors SEO but emphasizes extraction-ready chunks for ChatGPT/Perplexity.[3] Track via AI monitors for citations.[3]

**Key Factors:**
- Structured data for entity recognition.[1]
- Simple language matching user queries.[1]
- Bios with P-A-R case results.[1]
- llm.txt for content control.[1]

**Practical Guidance:** Use Schema.org generator, format pages with tables/checklists, audit speed/metadata. Query 'best [practice] lawyer' in AI weekly.

Follow this for citations in 4-6 weeks.
